caption.full:
Morenike Joela Evans will direct the body-swap rom-com 'Switch'.

The feature film centers on a Black teacher and a white executive who swap bodies after an escape room adventure. Alexis Louder is attached to star in and produce the project.

What kind of switch would you want to try for a day and why?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #SwitchMovie #MorenikeJoelaEvans
caption.firstComment: If you could swap lives with someone for 24 hours just to see the world through their eyes, who would it be and what’s the first thing you’d do?

The film follows a Black teacher and white executive who swap bodies after an escape room adventure. Evans and Louder previously collaborated on 'Deadly Dispatch.' What do you think of this pairing? Let us know in the comments!

youtube.title: Morenike Joela Evans to Direct 'Switch' Rom-Com
youtube.description:
Morenike Joela Evans will direct the body-swap romantic comedy 'Switch,' starring and produced by Alexis Louder. The film centers on a Black teacher and white executive who swap bodies after an escape room adventure. Bryan McClure originated the premise. Evans and Louder previously worked together on 'Deadly Dispatch.'

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/movies/morenike-joela-evans-signs-on-to-direct-body-swap-rom-com-switch/
